nasb.text: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries, Yet I do not turn aside from Your testimonies.

esv.text: Many are my persecutors and my adversaries, but I do not swerve from your testimonies.

cnv.text: 逼迫我的和敵擋我的很多， 但我沒有偏離你的法度。

ccb.text: 迫害我的仇敌众多， 但我却没有偏离你的法度。

csbs.text: 追逼我、以我为敌的人有许多， 但我没有偏离你的法度。
